message:
refactor(state,cli): unify timeline persistence path resolution with NTM_CONFIG/XDG precedence and validate checkpoint sessions via storage.List

Timeline persistence now follows the same config path resolution order
established in the state store refactor: NTM_CONFIG env var first, then
XDG_DATA_HOME, then ~/.local/share fallback. This ensures all persistent
data (state DB, timelines, cleanup markers, proficiency, session profiles)
co-locates under the same root when NTM_CONFIG is set.

Also hardens listCheckpointSessions to validate each directory entry via
storage.List rather than blindly trusting IsDir, filtering out empty or
corrupt session directories that would confuse downstream consumers.

- DefaultTimelinePersistConfig: NTM_CONFIG → XDG_DATA_HOME → ~/.local/share
- listCheckpointSessions: use storage.List to verify valid sessions
- Two new tests: XDG_DATA_HOME and NTM_CONFIG precedence for timeline dir

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
